title: pygmaeothamnus zeyheri var. livingstonianus
intro: Pygmaeothamnus zeyheri var. livingstonianus, also known as the Livingston's pygmaeothamnus, is a plant species that is part of the Thymelaeaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in southern Africa for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pygmaeothamnus zeyheri var. livingstonianus include the treatment of fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as the relief of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be made into a topical cream or ointment for external use.
